name: Ebony Glow
description: This stylish table lamp features a dark, tapered base with a metallic accent at the bottom and is topped with a classic, light-colored drum shade providing a warm and inviting glow.

name: Glowweave Lamp
description: Illuminate your space with the warm, intricate glow of our handcrafted Glowweave Lamp, a testament to artisan craftsmanship and timeless design.

name: Terra Lumina
description: Illuminate your space with the warm, inviting glow of our handcrafted clay lamp, a timeless piece designed to bring natural beauty and serene ambiance to any setting.
